description: Baby I Love Mummy Sleepsuit. Your loving baby will look adorable showing off their love for mummy in this cute onesie! Designed by Harry Bear, this white cotton baby grow is dotted with stars and showcases the slogan 'I Love Mummy'. This comfy all in one has cuffs for added cosiness and a popper fastening. Cuddles with mummy just got a whole lot sweeter with this super cute all in one! Finished with a hand-tied ribbon to make the perfect gift!
